# Uragaki UI - Full API Reference

> Hand-drawn, sketchy UI component library built on shadcn/ui + rough.js for React.
> For quick overview, see llms.txt

---

## Installation & Setup

### Install
```bash
npm install uragaki-ui roughjs
```

### Required Peer Dependencies
- react >= 18, react-dom >= 18
- tailwindcss >= 4
- roughjs ^4.6.0
- class-variance-authority ^0.7.0
- clsx ^2.0.0
- tailwind-merge ^3.0.0
- radix-ui ^1.0.0
- lucide-react >= 0.300.0 (optional, for icons)

### Setup
```tsx
import "uragaki-ui/styles.css";
import { ThemeProvider } from "uragaki-ui";

function App() {
  return (
    <ThemeProvider defaultTheme="system">
      {/* your app */}
    </ThemeProvider>
  );
}
```

### CSS Classes Available
- `.uragaki-paper` - Paper texture background with 24px grid pattern
- `.uragaki-wobble` - Keyframe animation (rotate + scale)
- `.uragaki-hover` - Applies wobble animation on hover
- `.uragaki-no-border` - Removes borders

### CSS Custom Properties (Design Tokens)
Light theme (oklch):
- `--background`: oklch(0.97 0.005 90) - Warm paper
- `--foreground`: oklch(0.25 0.02 60) - Dark text
- `--primary`: oklch(0.45 0.15 250) - Blue pencil
- `--secondary`: oklch(0.88 0.01 80) - Muted gray
- `--accent`: oklch(0.85 0.08 75) - Soft amber
- `--destructive`: oklch(0.55 0.2 25) - Red pencil
- `--border`: oklch(0.65 0.01 70)

Font variables:
- `--font-uragaki-body`: 'Sketchflow Print', 'Yusei Magic', cursive
- `--font-uragaki-heading`: 'Sketchflow Print', 'Yusei Magic', cursive
- `--font-uragaki-accent`: 'Sketchflow Print', 'Hachi Maru Pop', cursive

---

## Architecture

### How It Works
1. Each Uragaki component wraps a shadcn/ui (Radix UI) component
2. An SVG overlay is rendered using rough.js for hand-drawn borders
3. SVG uses `pointer-events: none` so underlying component stays fully interactive
4. All accessibility features from Radix UI are preserved

### Common Props (available on most components)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| roughness | number | 2.6 | How rough/sketchy the borders look |
| seed | number | auto | Fixed seed for consistent rendering (prevents flicker) |
| className | string | - | Additional CSS classes |

### Rough.js Defaults
- roughness: 2.6
- bowing: 1.8
- strokeWidth: 2
- fillStyle: "hachure"
- hachureAngle: -41
- hachureGap: 5

---

## Utilities

### ThemeProvider
Manages light/dark theme with system preference detection.

```tsx
import { ThemeProvider } from "uragaki-ui";

<ThemeProvider
  defaultTheme="system"  // "light" | "dark" | "system"
  storageKey="uragaki-ui-theme"  // localStorage key
>
  {children}
</ThemeProvider>
```

### useTheme
```tsx
import { useTheme } from "uragaki-ui";

const { theme, setTheme, resolvedTheme } = useTheme();
// theme: "light" | "dark" | "system"
// resolvedTheme: "light" | "dark" (actual resolved value)
```

### UragakiBorder
Core wrapper that adds rough.js borders to any content.

```tsx
import { UragakiBorder } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiBorder
  roughness={2.6}
  bowing={1.8}
  strokeWidth={2}
  stroke="currentColor"
  fill="#f0f0f0"           // optional fill color
  fillStyle="hachure"      // "hachure" | "cross-hatch" | "dots" | etc.
  seed={42}                // fixed seed for consistent rendering
  padding={0}
  shape="rectangle"        // "rectangle" | "ellipse"
  block={false}            // display: block vs inline
>
  {children}
</UragakiBorder>
```

---

## Components - Full API

### UragakiButton
Hand-drawn button with multiple variants.

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | "default" \| "destructive" \| "outline" \| "secondary" \| "ghost" \| "link" | "default" | Visual style |
| size | "default" \| "sm" \| "lg" \| "icon" | "default" | Button size |
| asChild | boolean | false | Render as child element (Radix Slot) |
| roughness | number | 2.6 | Border roughness |
| seed | number | auto | Rendering seed |

```tsx
import { UragakiButton } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiButton variant="default">Primary</UragakiButton>
<UragakiButton variant="destructive">Delete</UragakiButton>
<UragakiButton variant="outline">Outline</UragakiButton>
<UragakiButton variant="secondary">Secondary</UragakiButton>
<UragakiButton variant="ghost">Ghost</UragakiButton>
<UragakiButton variant="link">Link</UragakiButton>
<UragakiButton size="sm">Small</UragakiButton>
<UragakiButton size="lg">Large</UragakiButton>
<UragakiButton size="icon"><IconComponent /></UragakiButton>
```

Variant behavior:
- default: Primary color fill, white text
- destructive: Red fill, white text
- outline: Border only, no fill
- secondary: Gray fill
- ghost: Transparent, no border
- link: Transparent, underline text

---

### UragakiInput
Hand-drawn text input with two border styles.

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| borderStyle | "underline" \| "box" | "underline" | Border drawing style |
| roughness | number | 2.6 | Border roughness |
| seed | number | auto | Rendering seed |
| + all standard input props | | | type, placeholder, value, onChange, etc. |

```tsx
import { UragakiInput } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiInput placeholder="Name" />
<UragakiInput borderStyle="box" placeholder="Boxed input" />
<UragakiInput type="password" placeholder="Password" />
<UragakiInput type="email" placeholder="Email" />
```

---

### UragakiTextarea
Hand-drawn textarea with rough.js box border.

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| roughness | number | 2.6 | Border roughness |
| seed | number | auto | Rendering seed |
| + all standard textarea props | | | placeholder, rows, value, onChange, etc. |

```tsx
import { UragakiTextarea } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiTextarea placeholder="Write something..." rows={4} />
```

---

### UragakiCard
Hand-drawn card container with header, content, and footer sections.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiCardHeader, UragakiCardTitle, UragakiCardDescription, UragakiCardContent, UragakiCardFooter, UragakiCardAction

| Prop (Card) | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| roughness | number | 2.6 | Border roughness |
| seed | number | auto | Rendering seed |
| className | string | - | Additional CSS classes |

```tsx
import {
  UragakiCard, UragakiCardHeader, UragakiCardTitle,
  UragakiCardDescription, UragakiCardContent, UragakiCardFooter
} from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiCard>
  <UragakiCardHeader>
    <UragakiCardTitle>Card Title</UragakiCardTitle>
    <UragakiCardDescription>Card description</UragakiCardDescription>
  </UragakiCardHeader>
  <UragakiCardContent>
    <p>Card content goes here</p>
  </UragakiCardContent>
  <UragakiCardFooter>
    <UragakiButton>Action</UragakiButton>
  </UragakiCardFooter>
</UragakiCard>
```

---

### UragakiBadge
Inline badge with ellipse-shaped rough.js border.

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | "default" \| "destructive" \| "secondary" \| "outline" | "default" | Visual style |
| roughness | number | 2.6 | Border roughness |
| seed | number | auto | Rendering seed |

```tsx
import { UragakiBadge } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiBadge>Default</UragakiBadge>
<UragakiBadge variant="destructive">Error</UragakiBadge>
<UragakiBadge variant="secondary">Info</UragakiBadge>
<UragakiBadge variant="outline">Outline</UragakiBadge>
```

---

### UragakiAlert
Alert box with variant-based styling.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiAlertTitle, UragakiAlertDescription

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | "default" \| "destructive" | "default" | Alert style |
| roughness | number | 2.6 | Border roughness |
| seed | number | auto | Rendering seed |

```tsx
import { UragakiAlert, UragakiAlertTitle, UragakiAlertDescription } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiAlert>
  <UragakiAlertTitle>Heads up!</UragakiAlertTitle>
  <UragakiAlertDescription>Something to note.</UragakiAlertDescription>
</UragakiAlert>

<UragakiAlert variant="destructive">
  <UragakiAlertTitle>Error</UragakiAlertTitle>
  <UragakiAlertDescription>Something went wrong.</UragakiAlertDescription>
</UragakiAlert>
```

---

### UragakiCheckbox
Hand-drawn checkbox with rough.js SVG rendering.

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| roughness | number | 2.6 | Border roughness |
| seed | number | auto | Rendering seed |
| checked | boolean | - | Controlled checked state |
| onCheckedChange | (checked: boolean) => void | - | Change handler |

```tsx
import { UragakiCheckbox } from "uragaki-ui";
import { UragakiLabel } from "uragaki-ui";

<div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  <UragakiCheckbox id="terms" />
  <UragakiLabel htmlFor="terms">Accept terms</UragakiLabel>
</div>
```

---

### UragakiRadioGroup
Hand-drawn radio buttons with ellipse-shaped borders.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiRadioGroupItem

```tsx
import { UragakiRadioGroup, UragakiRadioGroupItem } from "uragaki-ui";
import { UragakiLabel } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiRadioGroup defaultValue="option1">
  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    <UragakiRadioGroupItem value="option1" id="opt1" />
    <UragakiLabel htmlFor="opt1">Option 1</UragakiLabel>
  </div>
  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    <UragakiRadioGroupItem value="option2" id="opt2" />
    <UragakiLabel htmlFor="opt2">Option 2</UragakiLabel>
  </div>
</UragakiRadioGroup>
```

---

### UragakiSelect
Hand-drawn select dropdown.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiSelectTrigger, UragakiSelectContent, UragakiSelectItem, UragakiSelectValue, UragakiSelectGroup, UragakiSelectLabel

| Prop (Trigger) | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| roughness | number | 2.6 | Border roughness |
| seed | number | auto | Rendering seed |

| Prop (Content) | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| roughness | number | 2.6 | Border roughness |
| position | "popper" \| "item-aligned" | "popper" | Dropdown positioning |

```tsx
import {
  UragakiSelect, UragakiSelectTrigger, UragakiSelectContent,
  UragakiSelectItem, UragakiSelectValue
} from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiSelect>
  <UragakiSelectTrigger className="w-[200px]">
    <UragakiSelectValue placeholder="Select..." />
  </UragakiSelectTrigger>
  <UragakiSelectContent>
    <UragakiSelectItem value="apple">Apple</UragakiSelectItem>
    <UragakiSelectItem value="banana">Banana</UragakiSelectItem>
    <UragakiSelectItem value="cherry">Cherry</UragakiSelectItem>
  </UragakiSelectContent>
</UragakiSelect>
```

---

### UragakiSwitch
Hand-drawn toggle switch with ellipse border.

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| roughness | number | 2.6 | Border roughness |
| seed | number | auto | Rendering seed |
| checked | boolean | - | Controlled state |
| onCheckedChange | (checked: boolean) => void | - | Change handler |

```tsx
import { UragakiSwitch } from "uragaki-ui";

<div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  <UragakiSwitch id="notifications" />
  <UragakiLabel htmlFor="notifications">Notifications</UragakiLabel>
</div>
```

---

### UragakiSlider
Range slider with sketchy styling.

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| defaultValue | number[] | - | Initial value(s) |
| min | number | 0 | Minimum value |
| max | number | 100 | Maximum value |
| step | number | 1 | Step increment |

```tsx
import { UragakiSlider } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiSlider defaultValue={[50]} max={100} step={1} />
```

---

### UragakiToggle / UragakiToggleGroup
Hand-drawn toggle buttons.

```tsx
import { UragakiToggle } from "uragaki-ui";
import { UragakiToggleGroup, UragakiToggleGroupItem } from "uragaki-ui";
import { Bold, Italic, Underline } from "lucide-react";

<UragakiToggle aria-label="Toggle bold">
  <Bold className="h-4 w-4" />
</UragakiToggle>

<UragakiToggleGroup type="multiple">
  <UragakiToggleGroupItem value="bold"><Bold className="h-4 w-4" /></UragakiToggleGroupItem>
  <UragakiToggleGroupItem value="italic"><Italic className="h-4 w-4" /></UragakiToggleGroupItem>
  <UragakiToggleGroupItem value="underline"><Underline className="h-4 w-4" /></UragakiToggleGroupItem>
</UragakiToggleGroup>
```

---

### UragakiTabs
Tabbed interface with rough.js active state.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiTabsList, UragakiTabsTrigger, UragakiTabsContent

| Prop (TabsTrigger) | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| roughness | number | 2.6 | Border roughness |
| value | string | required | Tab identifier |

```tsx
import { UragakiTabs, UragakiTabsList, UragakiTabsTrigger, UragakiTabsContent } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiTabs defaultValue="account">
  <UragakiTabsList>
    <UragakiTabsTrigger value="account">Account</UragakiTabsTrigger>
    <UragakiTabsTrigger value="settings">Settings</UragakiTabsTrigger>
  </UragakiTabsList>
  <UragakiTabsContent value="account">Account settings here</UragakiTabsContent>
  <UragakiTabsContent value="settings">General settings here</UragakiTabsContent>
</UragakiTabs>
```

---

### UragakiAccordion
Expandable sections with rough.js borders.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiAccordionItem, UragakiAccordionTrigger, UragakiAccordionContent

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| type | "single" \| "multiple" | required | Single or multi expand |
| collapsible | boolean | false | Allow all closed (single mode) |
| roughness | number | 2.6 | Border roughness |

```tsx
import { UragakiAccordion, UragakiAccordionItem, UragakiAccordionTrigger, UragakiAccordionContent } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiAccordion type="single" collapsible>
  <UragakiAccordionItem value="item-1">
    <UragakiAccordionTrigger>Section 1</UragakiAccordionTrigger>
    <UragakiAccordionContent>Content 1</UragakiAccordionContent>
  </UragakiAccordionItem>
  <UragakiAccordionItem value="item-2">
    <UragakiAccordionTrigger>Section 2</UragakiAccordionTrigger>
    <UragakiAccordionContent>Content 2</UragakiAccordionContent>
  </UragakiAccordionItem>
</UragakiAccordion>
```

---

### UragakiDialog
Modal dialog with hand-drawn borders and close button.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiDialogTrigger, UragakiDialogContent, UragakiDialogHeader, UragakiDialogFooter, UragakiDialogTitle, UragakiDialogDescription

| Prop (Content) | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| roughness | number | 2.6 | Border roughness |
| seed | number | auto | Rendering seed |

```tsx
import {
  UragakiDialog, UragakiDialogTrigger, UragakiDialogContent,
  UragakiDialogHeader, UragakiDialogFooter, UragakiDialogTitle,
  UragakiDialogDescription, UragakiButton
} from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiDialog>
  <UragakiDialogTrigger asChild>
    <UragakiButton variant="outline">Edit Profile</UragakiButton>
  </UragakiDialogTrigger>
  <UragakiDialogContent>
    <UragakiDialogHeader>
      <UragakiDialogTitle>Edit Profile</UragakiDialogTitle>
      <UragakiDialogDescription>Make changes to your profile.</UragakiDialogDescription>
    </UragakiDialogHeader>
    <div className="space-y-4">
      <UragakiInput placeholder="Name" />
      <UragakiInput placeholder="Email" type="email" />
    </div>
    <UragakiDialogFooter>
      <UragakiButton>Save changes</UragakiButton>
    </UragakiDialogFooter>
  </UragakiDialogContent>
</UragakiDialog>
```

---

### UragakiAlertDialog
Confirmation dialog (non-dismissable by clicking outside).

**Subcomponents:** UragakiAlertDialogTrigger, UragakiAlertDialogContent, UragakiAlertDialogHeader, UragakiAlertDialogFooter, UragakiAlertDialogTitle, UragakiAlertDialogDescription, UragakiAlertDialogAction, UragakiAlertDialogCancel

```tsx
import {
  UragakiAlertDialog, UragakiAlertDialogTrigger, UragakiAlertDialogContent,
  UragakiAlertDialogHeader, UragakiAlertDialogFooter, UragakiAlertDialogTitle,
  UragakiAlertDialogDescription, UragakiAlertDialogAction, UragakiAlertDialogCancel,
  UragakiButton
} from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiAlertDialog>
  <UragakiAlertDialogTrigger asChild>
    <UragakiButton variant="destructive">Delete</UragakiButton>
  </UragakiAlertDialogTrigger>
  <UragakiAlertDialogContent>
    <UragakiAlertDialogHeader>
      <UragakiAlertDialogTitle>Are you sure?</UragakiAlertDialogTitle>
      <UragakiAlertDialogDescription>This action cannot be undone.</UragakiAlertDialogDescription>
    </UragakiAlertDialogHeader>
    <UragakiAlertDialogFooter>
      <UragakiAlertDialogCancel>Cancel</UragakiAlertDialogCancel>
      <UragakiAlertDialogAction>Delete</UragakiAlertDialogAction>
    </UragakiAlertDialogFooter>
  </UragakiAlertDialogContent>
</UragakiAlertDialog>
```

---

### UragakiSheet
Slide-in panel (side drawer).

**Subcomponents:** UragakiSheetTrigger, UragakiSheetContent, UragakiSheetHeader, UragakiSheetFooter, UragakiSheetTitle, UragakiSheetDescription, UragakiSheetClose

```tsx
import {
  UragakiSheet, UragakiSheetTrigger, UragakiSheetContent,
  UragakiSheetHeader, UragakiSheetTitle, UragakiSheetDescription,
  UragakiButton
} from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiSheet>
  <UragakiSheetTrigger asChild>
    <UragakiButton variant="outline">Open Panel</UragakiButton>
  </UragakiSheetTrigger>
  <UragakiSheetContent>
    <UragakiSheetHeader>
      <UragakiSheetTitle>Settings</UragakiSheetTitle>
      <UragakiSheetDescription>Manage your preferences.</UragakiSheetDescription>
    </UragakiSheetHeader>
    <div className="py-4">Content here</div>
  </UragakiSheetContent>
</UragakiSheet>
```

---

### UragakiDrawer
Bottom sheet / drawer (mobile-friendly, uses vaul).

**Subcomponents:** UragakiDrawerTrigger, UragakiDrawerClose, UragakiDrawerContent, UragakiDrawerHeader, UragakiDrawerFooter, UragakiDrawerTitle, UragakiDrawerDescription

```tsx
import {
  UragakiDrawer, UragakiDrawerTrigger, UragakiDrawerContent,
  UragakiDrawerHeader, UragakiDrawerTitle, UragakiDrawerDescription,
  UragakiDrawerFooter, UragakiDrawerClose, UragakiButton
} from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiDrawer>
  <UragakiDrawerTrigger asChild>
    <UragakiButton variant="outline">Open Drawer</UragakiButton>
  </UragakiDrawerTrigger>
  <UragakiDrawerContent>
    <UragakiDrawerHeader>
      <UragakiDrawerTitle>Menu</UragakiDrawerTitle>
      <UragakiDrawerDescription>Select an option</UragakiDrawerDescription>
    </UragakiDrawerHeader>
    <div className="p-4">Drawer content</div>
    <UragakiDrawerFooter>
      <UragakiDrawerClose asChild>
        <UragakiButton variant="outline">Close</UragakiButton>
      </UragakiDrawerClose>
    </UragakiDrawerFooter>
  </UragakiDrawerContent>
</UragakiDrawer>
```

---

### UragakiPopover
Floating content anchored to a trigger.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiPopoverTrigger, UragakiPopoverContent

| Prop (Content) | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| roughness | number | 2.6 | Border roughness |
| seed | number | auto | Rendering seed |

```tsx
import { UragakiPopover, UragakiPopoverTrigger, UragakiPopoverContent, UragakiButton } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiPopover>
  <UragakiPopoverTrigger asChild>
    <UragakiButton variant="outline">Info</UragakiButton>
  </UragakiPopoverTrigger>
  <UragakiPopoverContent className="w-80">
    <p>Popover content here</p>
  </UragakiPopoverContent>
</UragakiPopover>
```

---

### UragakiHoverCard
Content shown on hover over a trigger.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiHoverCardTrigger, UragakiHoverCardContent

```tsx
import { UragakiHoverCard, UragakiHoverCardTrigger, UragakiHoverCardContent } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiHoverCard>
  <UragakiHoverCardTrigger asChild>
    <a href="#">@username</a>
  </UragakiHoverCardTrigger>
  <UragakiHoverCardContent>
    <p>User profile info here</p>
  </UragakiHoverCardContent>
</UragakiHoverCard>
```

---

### UragakiTooltip
Small tooltip on hover.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiTooltipProvider, UragakiTooltipTrigger, UragakiTooltipContent

```tsx
import { UragakiTooltipProvider, UragakiTooltip, UragakiTooltipTrigger, UragakiTooltipContent, UragakiButton } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiTooltipProvider>
  <UragakiTooltip>
    <UragakiTooltipTrigger asChild>
      <UragakiButton variant="outline">Hover me</UragakiButton>
    </UragakiTooltipTrigger>
    <UragakiTooltipContent>
      <p>Tooltip text</p>
    </UragakiTooltipContent>
  </UragakiTooltip>
</UragakiTooltipProvider>
```

---

### UragakiDropdownMenu
Dropdown menu triggered by a button.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiDropdownMenuTrigger, UragakiDropdownMenuContent, UragakiDropdownMenuGroup, UragakiDropdownMenuItem, UragakiDropdownMenuLabel, UragakiDropdownMenuSeparator, UragakiDropdownMenuShortcut, UragakiDropdownMenuCheckboxItem, UragakiDropdownMenuRadioGroup, UragakiDropdownMenuRadioItem, UragakiDropdownMenuSub, UragakiDropdownMenuSubTrigger, UragakiDropdownMenuSubContent

```tsx
import {
  UragakiDropdownMenu, UragakiDropdownMenuTrigger, UragakiDropdownMenuContent,
  UragakiDropdownMenuItem, UragakiDropdownMenuLabel, UragakiDropdownMenuSeparator,
  UragakiButton
} from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiDropdownMenu>
  <UragakiDropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
    <UragakiButton variant="outline">Menu</UragakiButton>
  </UragakiDropdownMenuTrigger>
  <UragakiDropdownMenuContent>
    <UragakiDropdownMenuLabel>Actions</UragakiDropdownMenuLabel>
    <UragakiDropdownMenuSeparator />
    <UragakiDropdownMenuItem>Edit</UragakiDropdownMenuItem>
    <UragakiDropdownMenuItem>Duplicate</UragakiDropdownMenuItem>
    <UragakiDropdownMenuSeparator />
    <UragakiDropdownMenuItem>Delete</UragakiDropdownMenuItem>
  </UragakiDropdownMenuContent>
</UragakiDropdownMenu>
```

---

### UragakiContextMenu
Right-click context menu.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiContextMenuTrigger, UragakiContextMenuContent, UragakiContextMenuGroup, UragakiContextMenuItem, UragakiContextMenuLabel, UragakiContextMenuSeparator, UragakiContextMenuShortcut, UragakiContextMenuCheckboxItem, UragakiContextMenuRadioGroup, UragakiContextMenuRadioItem, UragakiContextMenuSub, UragakiContextMenuSubTrigger, UragakiContextMenuSubContent

```tsx
import {
  UragakiContextMenu, UragakiContextMenuTrigger, UragakiContextMenuContent,
  UragakiContextMenuItem
} from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiContextMenu>
  <UragakiContextMenuTrigger className="p-8 border border-dashed">
    Right click here
  </UragakiContextMenuTrigger>
  <UragakiContextMenuContent>
    <UragakiContextMenuItem>Copy</UragakiContextMenuItem>
    <UragakiContextMenuItem>Paste</UragakiContextMenuItem>
    <UragakiContextMenuItem>Delete</UragakiContextMenuItem>
  </UragakiContextMenuContent>
</UragakiContextMenu>
```

---

### UragakiMenubar
Horizontal menu bar (like desktop app menus).

**Subcomponents:** UragakiMenubarMenu, UragakiMenubarTrigger, UragakiMenubarContent, UragakiMenubarItem, UragakiMenubarSeparator, UragakiMenubarLabel, UragakiMenubarCheckboxItem, UragakiMenubarRadioGroup, UragakiMenubarRadioItem, UragakiMenubarGroup, UragakiMenubarSub, UragakiMenubarSubContent, UragakiMenubarSubTrigger, UragakiMenubarShortcut

```tsx
import {
  UragakiMenubar, UragakiMenubarMenu, UragakiMenubarTrigger,
  UragakiMenubarContent, UragakiMenubarItem, UragakiMenubarSeparator
} from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiMenubar>
  <UragakiMenubarMenu>
    <UragakiMenubarTrigger>File</UragakiMenubarTrigger>
    <UragakiMenubarContent>
      <UragakiMenubarItem>New</UragakiMenubarItem>
      <UragakiMenubarItem>Open</UragakiMenubarItem>
      <UragakiMenubarSeparator />
      <UragakiMenubarItem>Save</UragakiMenubarItem>
    </UragakiMenubarContent>
  </UragakiMenubarMenu>
</UragakiMenubar>
```

---

### UragakiAvatar
Circular avatar with ellipse-shaped rough.js border.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiAvatarImage, UragakiAvatarFallback

```tsx
import { UragakiAvatar, UragakiAvatarImage, UragakiAvatarFallback } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiAvatar>
  <UragakiAvatarImage src="https://example.com/avatar.jpg" alt="User" />
  <UragakiAvatarFallback>YI</UragakiAvatarFallback>
</UragakiAvatar>
```

---

### UragakiProgress
Progress bar with rough.js border.

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| value | number | 0 | Progress percentage (0-100) |
| roughness | number | 2.6 | Border roughness |

```tsx
import { UragakiProgress } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiProgress value={60} />
```

---

### UragakiSkeleton
Loading placeholder with sketchy border.

```tsx
import { UragakiSkeleton } from "uragaki-ui";

<div className="space-y-2">
  <UragakiSkeleton className="h-4 w-[250px]" />
  <UragakiSkeleton className="h-4 w-[200px]" />
  <UragakiSkeleton className="h-12 w-12 rounded-full" />
</div>
```

---

### UragakiSeparator
Hand-drawn horizontal or vertical line.

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| orientation | "horizontal" \| "vertical" | "horizontal" | Line direction |
| roughness | number | 2.6 | Line roughness |

```tsx
import { UragakiSeparator } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiSeparator />
<UragakiSeparator orientation="vertical" className="h-8" />
```

---

### UragakiTable
Data table with rough.js border wrapper.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiTableHeader, UragakiTableBody, UragakiTableFooter, UragakiTableHead, UragakiTableRow, UragakiTableCell, UragakiTableCaption

```tsx
import {
  UragakiTable, UragakiTableHeader, UragakiTableBody,
  UragakiTableRow, UragakiTableHead, UragakiTableCell
} from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiTable>
  <UragakiTableHeader>
    <UragakiTableRow>
      <UragakiTableHead>Name</UragakiTableHead>
      <UragakiTableHead>Email</UragakiTableHead>
    </UragakiTableRow>
  </UragakiTableHeader>
  <UragakiTableBody>
    <UragakiTableRow>
      <UragakiTableCell>Alice</UragakiTableCell>
      <UragakiTableCell>alice@example.com</UragakiTableCell>
    </UragakiTableRow>
  </UragakiTableBody>
</UragakiTable>
```

---

### UragakiCalendar
Date picker calendar with rough.js border.

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| selected | Date | - | Selected date |
| onSelect | (date: Date) => void | - | Selection handler |
| roughness | number | 2.6 | Border roughness |
| + all react-day-picker DayPicker props | | | |

```tsx
import { UragakiCalendar } from "uragaki-ui";

const [date, setDate] = useState<Date | undefined>();
<UragakiCalendar mode="single" selected={date} onSelect={setDate} />
```

---

### UragakiCollapsible
Expandable/collapsible content section.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiCollapsibleTrigger, UragakiCollapsibleContent

```tsx
import { UragakiCollapsible, UragakiCollapsibleTrigger, UragakiCollapsibleContent, UragakiButton } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiCollapsible>
  <UragakiCollapsibleTrigger asChild>
    <UragakiButton variant="ghost">Toggle</UragakiButton>
  </UragakiCollapsibleTrigger>
  <UragakiCollapsibleContent>
    <p>Collapsible content here</p>
  </UragakiCollapsibleContent>
</UragakiCollapsible>
```

---

### UragakiAspectRatio
Maintains aspect ratio with rough.js border.

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| ratio | number | 16/9 | Width/height ratio |

```tsx
import { UragakiAspectRatio } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiAspectRatio ratio={16 / 9}>
  <img src="image.jpg" alt="Photo" className="object-cover w-full h-full" />
</UragakiAspectRatio>
```

---

### UragakiScrollArea
Scrollable area with rough.js border.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiScrollBar

```tsx
import { UragakiScrollArea } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiScrollArea className="h-[200px] w-[300px]">
  <div className="p-4">
    {/* Long content here */}
  </div>
</UragakiScrollArea>
```

---

### UragakiResizablePanelGroup
Resizable panel layout with rough.js border.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiResizablePanel, UragakiResizableHandle

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| direction | "horizontal" \| "vertical" | required | Panel layout direction |

```tsx
import { UragakiResizablePanelGroup, UragakiResizablePanel, UragakiResizableHandle } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiResizablePanelGroup direction="horizontal">
  <UragakiResizablePanel defaultSize={50}>Left panel</UragakiResizablePanel>
  <UragakiResizableHandle />
  <UragakiResizablePanel defaultSize={50}>Right panel</UragakiResizablePanel>
</UragakiResizablePanelGroup>
```

---

### UragakiForm
Form components with react-hook-form integration.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiFormField, UragakiFormItem, UragakiFormLabel, UragakiFormControl, UragakiFormDescription, UragakiFormMessage

```tsx
import { useForm } from "react-hook-form";
import { zodResolver } from "@hookform/resolvers/zod";
import { z } from "zod";
import {
  UragakiForm, UragakiFormField, UragakiFormItem,
  UragakiFormLabel, UragakiFormControl, UragakiFormMessage,
  UragakiInput, UragakiButton
} from "uragaki-ui";

const schema = z.object({ name: z.string().min(1) });

function MyForm() {
  const form = useForm({ resolver: zodResolver(schema) });

  return (
    <UragakiForm {...form}>
      <form onSubmit={form.handleSubmit(onSubmit)}>
        <UragakiFormField
          control={form.control}
          name="name"
          render={({ field }) => (
            <UragakiFormItem>
              <UragakiFormLabel>Name</UragakiFormLabel>
              <UragakiFormControl>
                <UragakiInput {...field} />
              </UragakiFormControl>
              <UragakiFormMessage />
            </UragakiFormItem>
          )}
        />
        <UragakiButton type="submit">Submit</UragakiButton>
      </form>
    </UragakiForm>
  );
}
```

---

### UragakiInputOTP
One-time password input with sketchy slots.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiInputOTPGroup, UragakiInputOTPSlot, UragakiInputOTPSeparator

```tsx
import { UragakiInputOTP, UragakiInputOTPGroup, UragakiInputOTPSlot } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiInputOTP maxLength={6}>
  <UragakiInputOTPGroup>
    <UragakiInputOTPSlot index={0} />
    <UragakiInputOTPSlot index={1} />
    <UragakiInputOTPSlot index={2} />
  </UragakiInputOTPGroup>
  <UragakiInputOTPGroup>
    <UragakiInputOTPSlot index={3} />
    <UragakiInputOTPSlot index={4} />
    <UragakiInputOTPSlot index={5} />
  </UragakiInputOTPGroup>
</UragakiInputOTP>
```

---

### UragakiSonner
Toast notification system (wraps Sonner).

```tsx
import { UragakiSonner } from "uragaki-ui";
import { toast } from "sonner";

// Add to layout
<UragakiSonner />

// Trigger toasts
toast("Event created");
toast.success("Success!");
toast.error("Something went wrong");
```

---

### UragakiCarousel
Image/content carousel (uses embla-carousel-react).

**Subcomponents:** UragakiCarouselContent, UragakiCarouselItem, UragakiCarouselPrevious, UragakiCarouselNext

```tsx
import { UragakiCarousel, UragakiCarouselContent, UragakiCarouselItem, UragakiCarouselPrevious, UragakiCarouselNext } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiCarousel>
  <UragakiCarouselContent>
    <UragakiCarouselItem>Slide 1</UragakiCarouselItem>
    <UragakiCarouselItem>Slide 2</UragakiCarouselItem>
    <UragakiCarouselItem>Slide 3</UragakiCarouselItem>
  </UragakiCarouselContent>
  <UragakiCarouselPrevious />
  <UragakiCarouselNext />
</UragakiCarousel>
```

---

### UragakiCommand
Command palette / search interface (uses cmdk).

**Subcomponents:** UragakiCommandDialog, UragakiCommandInput, UragakiCommandList, UragakiCommandEmpty, UragakiCommandGroup, UragakiCommandItem, UragakiCommandShortcut, UragakiCommandSeparator

```tsx
import {
  UragakiCommand, UragakiCommandInput, UragakiCommandList,
  UragakiCommandEmpty, UragakiCommandGroup, UragakiCommandItem
} from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiCommand>
  <UragakiCommandInput placeholder="Search..." />
  <UragakiCommandList>
    <UragakiCommandEmpty>No results found.</UragakiCommandEmpty>
    <UragakiCommandGroup heading="Actions">
      <UragakiCommandItem>New File</UragakiCommandItem>
      <UragakiCommandItem>Open Settings</UragakiCommandItem>
    </UragakiCommandGroup>
  </UragakiCommandList>
</UragakiCommand>
```

---

### UragakiNavigationMenu
Desktop navigation menu with dropdowns.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiNavigationMenuList, UragakiNavigationMenuItem, UragakiNavigationMenuContent, UragakiNavigationMenuTrigger, UragakiNavigationMenuLink, UragakiNavigationMenuIndicator, UragakiNavigationMenuViewport

```tsx
import {
  UragakiNavigationMenu, UragakiNavigationMenuList, UragakiNavigationMenuItem,
  UragakiNavigationMenuTrigger, UragakiNavigationMenuContent, UragakiNavigationMenuLink
} from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiNavigationMenu>
  <UragakiNavigationMenuList>
    <UragakiNavigationMenuItem>
      <UragakiNavigationMenuTrigger>Getting Started</UragakiNavigationMenuTrigger>
      <UragakiNavigationMenuContent>
        <UragakiNavigationMenuLink href="/docs">Documentation</UragakiNavigationMenuLink>
      </UragakiNavigationMenuContent>
    </UragakiNavigationMenuItem>
  </UragakiNavigationMenuList>
</UragakiNavigationMenu>
```

---

### UragakiBreadcrumb
Breadcrumb navigation.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiBreadcrumbList, UragakiBreadcrumbItem, UragakiBreadcrumbLink, UragakiBreadcrumbPage, UragakiBreadcrumbSeparator, UragakiBreadcrumbEllipsis

```tsx
import {
  UragakiBreadcrumb, UragakiBreadcrumbList, UragakiBreadcrumbItem,
  UragakiBreadcrumbLink, UragakiBreadcrumbSeparator, UragakiBreadcrumbPage
} from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiBreadcrumb>
  <UragakiBreadcrumbList>
    <UragakiBreadcrumbItem>
      <UragakiBreadcrumbLink href="/">Home</UragakiBreadcrumbLink>
    </UragakiBreadcrumbItem>
    <UragakiBreadcrumbSeparator />
    <UragakiBreadcrumbItem>
      <UragakiBreadcrumbPage>Current Page</UragakiBreadcrumbPage>
    </UragakiBreadcrumbItem>
  </UragakiBreadcrumbList>
</UragakiBreadcrumb>
```

---

### UragakiPagination
Page navigation.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiPaginationContent, UragakiPaginationItem, UragakiPaginationLink, UragakiPaginationPrevious, UragakiPaginationNext, UragakiPaginationEllipsis

```tsx
import {
  UragakiPagination, UragakiPaginationContent, UragakiPaginationItem,
  UragakiPaginationLink, UragakiPaginationPrevious, UragakiPaginationNext
} from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiPagination>
  <UragakiPaginationContent>
    <UragakiPaginationItem><UragakiPaginationPrevious href="#" /></UragakiPaginationItem>
    <UragakiPaginationItem><UragakiPaginationLink href="#">1</UragakiPaginationLink></UragakiPaginationItem>
    <UragakiPaginationItem><UragakiPaginationLink href="#" isActive>2</UragakiPaginationLink></UragakiPaginationItem>
    <UragakiPaginationItem><UragakiPaginationLink href="#">3</UragakiPaginationLink></UragakiPaginationItem>
    <UragakiPaginationItem><UragakiPaginationNext href="#" /></UragakiPaginationItem>
  </UragakiPaginationContent>
</UragakiPagination>
```

---

### UragakiSidebar
Full sidebar layout system.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiSidebarProvider, UragakiSidebarHeader, UragakiSidebarContent, UragakiSidebarFooter, UragakiSidebarGroup, UragakiSidebarGroupLabel, UragakiSidebarGroupAction, UragakiSidebarGroupContent, UragakiSidebarMenu, UragakiSidebarMenuItem, UragakiSidebarMenuButton, UragakiSidebarMenuAction, UragakiSidebarMenuBadge, UragakiSidebarMenuSkeleton, UragakiSidebarMenuSub, UragakiSidebarMenuSubItem, UragakiSidebarMenuSubButton, UragakiSidebarInput, UragakiSidebarInset, UragakiSidebarRail, UragakiSidebarSeparator, UragakiSidebarTrigger

**Hook:** useUragakiSidebar()

```tsx
import {
  UragakiSidebarProvider, UragakiSidebar, UragakiSidebarHeader,
  UragakiSidebarContent, UragakiSidebarGroup, UragakiSidebarGroupLabel,
  UragakiSidebarGroupContent, UragakiSidebarMenu, UragakiSidebarMenuItem,
  UragakiSidebarMenuButton, UragakiSidebarInset, UragakiSidebarTrigger
} from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiSidebarProvider>
  <UragakiSidebar>
    <UragakiSidebarHeader>
      <h2>App Name</h2>
    </UragakiSidebarHeader>
    <UragakiSidebarContent>
      <UragakiSidebarGroup>
        <UragakiSidebarGroupLabel>Menu</UragakiSidebarGroupLabel>
        <UragakiSidebarGroupContent>
          <UragakiSidebarMenu>
            <UragakiSidebarMenuItem>
              <UragakiSidebarMenuButton>Dashboard</UragakiSidebarMenuButton>
            </UragakiSidebarMenuItem>
          </UragakiSidebarMenu>
        </UragakiSidebarGroupContent>
      </UragakiSidebarGroup>
    </UragakiSidebarContent>
  </UragakiSidebar>
  <UragakiSidebarInset>
    <header><UragakiSidebarTrigger /></header>
    <main>Page content</main>
  </UragakiSidebarInset>
</UragakiSidebarProvider>
```

---

### UragakiChartContainer
Chart wrapper for recharts with sketchy styling.

**Subcomponents:** UragakiChartTooltip, UragakiChartTooltipContent, UragakiChartLegend, UragakiChartLegendContent, UragakiChartStyle

**Type:** ChartConfig

```tsx
import { UragakiChartContainer, UragakiChartTooltip, UragakiChartTooltipContent, type ChartConfig } from "uragaki-ui";
import { BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis } from "recharts";

const chartConfig: ChartConfig = {
  sales: { label: "Sales", color: "oklch(0.45 0.15 250)" },
};

<UragakiChartContainer config={chartConfig} className="h-[300px]">
  <BarChart data={data}>
    <XAxis dataKey="month" />
    <YAxis />
    <UragakiChartTooltip content={<UragakiChartTooltipContent />} />
    <Bar dataKey="sales" fill="var(--color-sales)" />
  </BarChart>
</UragakiChartContainer>
```

---

## Patterns & Best Practices

### Naming Convention
All components use the `Uragaki` prefix. The API mirrors shadcn/ui exactly, so if you know shadcn/ui, just add the prefix.

### Roughness Control
Lower roughness = cleaner lines. Higher roughness = more sketchy.
- `roughness={1}` - Subtle hand-drawn effect
- `roughness={2.6}` - Default sketchy look
- `roughness={5}` - Very rough, chaotic look

### Seed for Consistent Rendering
Without a seed, borders re-randomize on re-render. Use a fixed seed for stable UI:
```tsx
<UragakiCard seed={42}>Stable borders</UragakiCard>
```

### Dark Mode
Wrap your app with ThemeProvider. All components auto-adapt.
```tsx
const { setTheme } = useTheme();
setTheme("dark"); // or "light" or "system"
```

### Paper Background
Add the paper texture to your page:
```tsx
<div className="uragaki-paper min-h-screen">
  {/* your app */}
</div>
```

### Combining with Tailwind
All components accept className for Tailwind utility classes:
```tsx
<UragakiCard className="max-w-md mx-auto">
  <UragakiCardContent className="space-y-4 p-6">
    {/* content */}
  </UragakiCardContent>
</UragakiCard>
```
